message:
a11y(overlays): Add ARIA labels to canvas elements

Adds role="img" and descriptive aria-label attributes to all data
visualization canvas elements across overlay components:
- BendabilityOverlay: DNA flexibility profile graph
- CGROverlay: Chaos Game Representation patterns
- ComplexityOverlay: Shannon entropy graph
- EnvironmentalProvenanceOverlay: Biome distribution chart
- GCSkewOverlay: GC content graph
- HilbertOverlay: Space-filling curve visualization
- KmerAnomalyOverlay: k-mer frequency anomalies
- SelectionPressureOverlay: dN/dS ratio visualization
- TranscriptionFlowOverlay: Gene expression flow

These improvements help screen readers convey the purpose of each
visualization to users with visual impairments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -379,6 +379,8 @@ export function CGROverlay({ repository, currentPhage }: CGROverlayProps): React
             >
               <canvas
                 ref={canvasRef}
+                role="img"
+                aria-label="Chaos Game Representation showing nucleotide sequence patterns"
                 style={{ width: '100%', height: 'auto', aspectRatio: '1 / 1', display: 'block' }}
               />
               <div

@@ -389,6 +389,8 @@ export function HilbertOverlay({ repository, currentPhage }: HilbertOverlayProps
             >
               <canvas
                 ref={canvasRef}
+                role="img"
+                aria-label="Hilbert curve visualization showing genome sequence as a space-filling curve"
                 style={{ width: '100%', height: 'auto', aspectRatio: '1 / 1', display: 'block' }}
               />
               <div

@@ -156,7 +156,7 @@ export function SelectionPressureOverlay({ repository, currentPhage }: Selection overflow: 'hidden', height: '150px', }}> - +
Global ω: 1 ? colors.error : colors.success }}>
